questions.question: Paul opposed Peter to his face in Antioch because Peter did what?
options: Withdrew from eating with Gentiles when Jewish believers arrived
questions.answer: Withdrew from eating with Gentiles when Jewish believers arrived

questions.question: The Jerusalem leaders recognized Paul's calling to preach to whom?
Paul says a person is justified by works of the law.
I have been crucified with Christ. It is no longer I who live, but _____ who lives in me.
If righteousness could be gained through the law, then Christ died for _____.
